info.title: MMT Risk Management Service
info.description:
Risk Management microservice for MMT Trading (MT4/MT5/MatchTrader/cTrader/B2Trader).
    - **Rules**: CRUD and list active rules (JSON conditions; matches emit notifications).
    - **Accounts**: CRUD accounts (login + broker), evaluation history by login.
    All responses use envelope `{ "code": "OK" | "ERROR_*", "message": "...", "data": ... }` except `GET /health` (plain JSON).

post.summary: Trigger one cron rules evaluation tick (UTC minute floor)
post.description: Runs the cron scheduler logic once for the current UTC minute (or optional override via future extension). Intended for ops / manual validation; secure at the gateway. Query ``dry_run=true`` returns counts only.

parameters.name: dry_run

schema.description: Only compute due memberships without evaluating
schema.title: Dry Run

parameters.description: Only compute due memberships without evaluating

post.summary: Patch account/phase metrics and optionally evaluate rules
post.description: Merges ``account_metrics`` into the account snapshot and runs the same rule evaluation path as ingress (match, streak, Kafka, unassign). ``phase_metrics`` updates a single phase's ``phase_metrics`` and publishes phase changelog events. Secure at the gateway in production; gated by ``METRICS_SIMULATION_ENABLED``.

Body must match the risk ingress contract (`type`, `event_id`, `payload`, optional `timestamp`). `event_version` is optional and defaults to `v1` on the server; when sent, use a string `vN` (same as Kafka `event_version` on trading-services.events.v1). Secure this route at the network/gateway if exposed beyond trusted bridges.

get.description: List all rules, optionally only enabled ones.

post.description:
Last N persisted rule evaluations per login (for the account row with that login).
Unknown logins return an empty list under that key.
Same as /evaluation-history/recent but restricted to evaluated_at between ``from`` and ``to`` (inclusive).

get.description: List accounts, optionally filtered by broker_id.

post.description: Register an account: MT5 profile + open positions snapshot, then one DB transaction (all or nothing).

get.description: Lightweight KPI counts for dashboards (no account rows).
Paginated account list + broker-scoped totals for KPI pills.

parameters.name: q

schema.description: Matches login substring or broker display name.
schema.title: Q

parameters.description: Matches login substring or broker display name.

post.description: Create account, one metric phase, and rules atomically (reuse matching library rules).

get.description: Get account by internal UUID. Live trading figures come from DB (ingested events), not SDK reads.

post.description: Create missing ``trades`` rows for positions already open on the platform (MT5 or B2T).

delete.description: Remove every rule linked to this account (library rules are unchanged).

get.description:
Open positions as persisted ``trades`` rows (``closed_at`` is null), newest ``opened_at`` first.
Use this for “what time was each position opened”; scalar metrics like ``positions_open_count`` do not carry per-position timestamps.
List metric phases for the account (active and inactive).

post.description: Create an active phase: live platform opening baseline + activation watermark.

patch.description: Deactivate a phase; live platform read, then freeze phase_metrics.

post.description:
Reset a phase in place: same id, name, and rule links; fresh broker baseline and metrics.

Clears phase audit history, evaluations, and match streaks without deleting rule memberships.

get.description: Time series for one metric inside a phase window (from phase change audit log).

parameters.name: granularity

schema.description: Series from phase metric change audit log (snapshot = each change row).
schema.title: Granularity

parameters.description: Series from phase metric change audit log (snapshot = each change row).

get.description: Audit log of metric deltas for one phase (same shape as Kafka / WebSocket payloads).
Sparkline series and day-over-day deltas from phase metric change audit (UTC days).

parameters.name: days

schema.description: Calendar days of series within the phase window.
schema.title: Days

parameters.description: Calendar days of series within the phase window.

get.description: Trade-level rows for activity KPIs within the phase window.

parameters.name: from_utc

schema.description: ISO-8601 start (UTC), clamped to phase window.
schema.title: From Utc

parameters.description: ISO-8601 start (UTC), clamped to phase window.

parameters.name: to_utc

schema.description: ISO-8601 end (UTC), clamped to phase window.
schema.title: To Utc

parameters.description: ISO-8601 end (UTC), clamped to phase window.

post.description: Attach an existing rule to this phase (preferred over PATCH ``/rules/{id}`` for membership).

get.description: Rules linked to this phase with per-link notify/automation flags.

patch.description: Update per-phase flags on a rule assignment (reset streak, unlink phase on match).

post.description:
Clear consecutive-match counter for this rule and phase (same scope as real-time evaluation).
Use when notify_after_matches > 1 and you want to start the streak from zero.

get.description: List all brokers (`credentials` omitted; `integration` merged with service defaults).

post.description:
Create a broker; response includes `credentials` and `integration`.

If a broker is considered a duplicate (MT4/MT5/B2Trader: same server/host, port, and login;
otherwise same ``name`` + ``broker_type`` when the connection triple cannot be inferred),
returns **200** with the existing record (including stored credentials) instead of creating
a duplicate (no live connect probe).

For a **new** broker, opens a live Platform API connection before persist; on failure
returns **422** and does not write the row.

get.description: Get broker by id (includes `credentials` and resolved `integration`).

patch.description: Update broker (partial). Send `integration` to replace overrides; response includes `credentials`.

delete.description: Delete broker by id. Also deletes all accounts linked to this broker.

get.description: Liveness + ingress latency, Kafka lag, readiness, and operational alerts.

AccountBrokerScopeTotals.title: AccountBrokerScopeTotals
AccountBrokerScopeTotals.description: Counts scoped to broker filter only (dashboard KPI pills for current broker / all).

breakeven_band_pct.title: Breakeven Band Pct
breakeven_band_pct.description: Break-even band as percent of opening equity (or opening balance if equity missing). When > 0, closes with |pnl| below that money threshold count as break-even; when 0, only |pnl| ≤ ε counts as break-even.

AccountCreate.title: AccountCreate
AccountCreate.description:
Payload to register an account: business login, broker, optional risk profile.

Opening equity and balance are **not** accepted here: the service reads them from the
trading platform (MT5 via the broker SDK pool) before creating the row.

total_filtered.title: Total Filtered
total_filtered.description: Accounts matching broker + search + estado filter.

AccountListPageResponse.title: AccountListPageResponse
AccountListPageResponse.description: Paginated list for admin UI; avoids loading every account row in one payload.

start_balance.title: Start Balance
start_balance.description: Flat opening equity and balance for the new account and its first phase (no platform snapshot; account starts with no open positions).

AccountProvisionCreate.title: AccountProvisionCreate
AccountProvisionCreate.description: Create account, one metric phase, and linked rules in a single transaction.

breakeven_band_pct.title: Breakeven Band Pct
breakeven_band_pct.description: Percent of opening equity (else balance) for break-even band; win/loss use thresholds ±band money.

mt5_platform_user.description: Trader profile from MT5 when broker SDK pool has an active connection.

current_win_streak.title: Current Win Streak
current_win_streak.description: Consecutive winning closes; rolled up on ingest from full closed-trade history.

current_loss_streak.title: Current Loss Streak
current_loss_streak.description: Consecutive losing closes; rolled up on ingest from full closed-trade history.

max_win_streak.title: Max Win Streak
max_win_streak.description: Largest consecutive winning closes seen for this account.

max_loss_streak.title: Max Loss Streak
max_loss_streak.description: Largest consecutive losing closes seen for this account.

running_equity_peak.title: Running Equity Peak
running_equity_peak.description: Running high-water equity from snapshots (basis for drawdown rollups).

max_drawdown_abs.title: Max Drawdown Abs
max_drawdown_abs.description: Max peak-to-trough equity drop in account currency since tracking began.

max_drawdown_pct.title: Max Drawdown Pct
max_drawdown_pct.description: Max drawdown as percent of running equity peak.

public_id.title: Public Id
public_id.description: B2Trader public account id for UI display; routing still uses login.

linked_rules_count.title: Linked Rules Count
linked_rules_count.description: Rules linked to active phases (paginated list enrichment).

active_rules_count.title: Active Rules Count
active_rules_count.description: Enabled rules among linked_rules_count (paginated list enrichment).

AccountUpdate.title: AccountUpdate
AccountUpdate.description: Payload to update an account (partial). Omitted fields are unchanged.

code.title: Code
code.description: OK on success; ERROR_* indicates error type.

data.description: Payload on success; null or details on error.

frozen_at_assignment.title: Frozen At Assignment
frozen_at_assignment.description: True when evaluation_snapshot exists on rule_accounts for this link.

BoundRuleEvaluationPayload.title: BoundRuleEvaluationPayload
BoundRuleEvaluationPayload.description: Logic bound to this account: snapshot at assignment; library rule edits do not change it.

credentials.title: Credentials
credentials.description: Opaque secret (e.g. MT5 password, API token). Returned only on GET/PATCH/POST by id, not on list.

BrokerCreate.title: BrokerCreate
BrokerCreate.description: Create broker: optional opaque `credentials` (e.g. MT5 password) and optional `integration` overrides.

events_http_path.title: Events Http Path
events_http_path.description: POST path on this Risk API; full URL is base URL + path.

BrokerIntegrationIngressResolved.title: BrokerIntegrationIngressResolved
BrokerIntegrationIngressResolved.description: How trusted bridges submit canonical event envelopes.

BrokerIntegrationInput.title: BrokerIntegrationInput
BrokerIntegrationInput.description: Stored in DB as JSON; merged with env defaults when returned as `integration`.

BrokerIntegrationKafkaResolved.title: BrokerIntegrationKafkaResolved
BrokerIntegrationKafkaResolved.description: Kafka client hints for egress (notifications, metric changes). Platform ingress is embedded Kafka or HTTP.

BrokerIntegrationResolved.title: BrokerIntegrationResolved
BrokerIntegrationResolved.description: Resolved integration for bridges and SDK workers.

topic_risk_notifications.title: Topic Risk Notifications
topic_risk_notifications.description: Deprecated: use topic_risk_events (same Kafka topic for all Risk egress).

BrokerKafkaConfigInput.title: BrokerKafkaConfigInput
BrokerKafkaConfigInput.description: Optional per-broker Kafka overrides (egress: notifications / metric fan-out).

integration_overrides.title: Integration Overrides
integration_overrides.description: Stored JSON overrides only; merged fields appear under `integration`.

sdk_live_status.title: Sdk Live Status
sdk_live_status.description: Runtime MT SDK / Platform API connection (per-broker pool); null if pool off or unknown.

sdk_live_message.title: Sdk Live Message
sdk_live_message.description: Short, non-secret hint when status is error or not_configured.

BrokerResponse.title: BrokerResponse
BrokerResponse.description: Broker with resolved `integration` and raw `integration_overrides` from DB (for round-trip edits).

platform_server.title: Platform Server
platform_server.description: Platform/broker host or URL (MT5 server, B2T balancer, …).

platform_login.title: Platform Login
platform_login.description: Manager/admin login (MT5 login or B2T Keycloak user).

BrokerSdkConfigInput.title: BrokerSdkConfigInput
BrokerSdkConfigInput.description: Optional per-broker overrides for MMT Trading SDK / Platform API (no passwords).

BrokerUpdate.title: BrokerUpdate
BrokerUpdate.description: Partial update. Send `integration` to replace overrides; omit field to leave unchanged.

DailyDelta.title: DailyDelta
DailyDelta.description: Today vs yesterday (UTC calendar day) for a daily-backed scalar.

by_login.title: By Login
by_login.description: Keys are the requested logins in request order; values newest-first.

EvaluationHistoryByLoginResponse.title: EvaluationHistoryByLoginResponse
EvaluationHistoryByLoginResponse.description: Evaluations grouped by requested login (unknown logins → empty list).

logins.title: Logins
logins.description: Account logins (business id). Duplicates and blank entries are removed.

logins.title: Logins
logins.description: Account logins (business id). Duplicates and blank entries are removed.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Max evaluations per login (newest first, for accounts with that login).

MatchStreakItem.title: MatchStreakItem
MatchStreakItem.description: Consecutive-match window that triggered notification (if applicable).

delta_from_prev.title: Delta From Prev
delta_from_prev.description: value - previous_bucket_value when both are numeric.

MetricHistoryPoint.title: MetricHistoryPoint
MetricHistoryPoint.description: One bucket / row in the metric time series.

truncated.title: Truncated
truncated.description: True if more rows exist after this page.

net_change_first_to_last.title: Net Change First To Last
net_change_first_to_last.description: Last value minus first value in chronological order (filtered set).

max_abs_delta.title: Max Abs Delta
max_abs_delta.description: Largest |delta| among points with a defined delta.

MetricHistorySummary.title: MetricHistorySummary
MetricHistorySummary.description: Aggregates over the filtered series (chronological order), before pagination.

phase_metrics.title: Phase Metrics
phase_metrics.description: Merged into ``account_metric_phases.phase_metrics`` for the given phase.

evaluate_rules.title: Evaluate Rules
evaluate_rules.description: Run ``EvaluateOnEventUseCase`` after patches. Rules on the phase use ``phase_metrics`` only.

MetricsSimulationRequest.title: MetricsSimulationRequest
MetricsSimulationRequest.description: Patch phase metrics, optionally re-run rule evaluation.

Mt5PlatformUserSnapshot.title: Mt5PlatformUserSnapshot
Mt5PlatformUserSnapshot.description: Trader profile from Platform API / MT5 (``GET /users/{login}`` via SDK). Omitted when pool is down.

OpenTradeRow.title: OpenTradeRow
OpenTradeRow.description: Open position ingested as a trade row with ``closed_at`` null (MT5 / platform deals).

time_kind.title: Time Kind
time_kind.description: Which timestamp is the primary axis for this metric (apertura vs cierre).

series.title: Series
series.description: Metric key → values aligned with dates_utc (null if no row that day).

daily_deltas.title: Daily Deltas
daily_deltas.description: Fields where both today and yesterday daily rows exist with numeric values.

series_end_date_utc.title: Series End Date Utc
series_end_date_utc.description: Last day included in the series window (YYYY-MM-DD).

PhaseRuleAssignRequest.title: PhaseRuleAssignRequest
PhaseRuleAssignRequest.description: Assign an existing rule to a phase (creates ``rule_phases`` row).

membership.description: Active membership after assign; null when unlinked on immediate match.

matched_on_assign.title: Matched On Assign
matched_on_assign.description: True when the rule matched during the post-assign evaluation.

removed_on_match.title: Removed On Match
removed_on_match.description: True when ``unassign_on_match`` removed the link after immediate match.

PhaseRuleAssignResult.title: PhaseRuleAssignResult
PhaseRuleAssignResult.description: Outcome of linking a rule, including optional immediate evaluation on assign.

since_assignment_ratios.title: Since Assignment Ratios
since_assignment_ratios.description: Win/loss/breakeven rates from closes at or after ``assigned_at`` (aligned with evaluator).

PhaseRuleMembershipItem.title: PhaseRuleMembershipItem
PhaseRuleMembershipItem.description: One rule linked to a phase with assignment metadata and settings.

PhaseRulesClearedResponse.title: PhaseRulesClearedResponse
PhaseRulesClearedResponse.description: Result of removing all rule assignments for an account (all phases).

ProvisionRuleCreate.title: ProvisionRuleCreate
ProvisionRuleCreate.description: Rule template assigned to the created phase (server sets phase_ids).

phase_ids.title: Phase Ids
phase_ids.description: Metric phases (internal UUIDs) this rule applies to. Omit or empty = library rule.

name.title: Name
name.description: Optional label; when set, must be unique within the same scope (library vs each account).

notify_after_matches.title: Notify After Matches
notify_after_matches.description: Require this many consecutive evaluations where the rule matches before emitting risk_notification. Counter is per rule and account; resets when the rule does not match or after a notification. Stored in Postgres.

cron_expression.title: Cron Expression
cron_expression.description: If null, full rule evaluation (audit + Kafka + streak + unassign) runs on real-time events. If set (five-field cron, UTC — same as dashboard), real-time ingress still checks conditions, but notifications, persisted evaluations, streak advances, and unassign run only when the Risk API cron tick reaches that UTC minute.

violation_interval.title: Violation Interval
violation_interval.description: Milliseconds within which repeated matches count as the same incident (soft rules / deduplication). Omit or null when not using an incident window.

conditions.title: Conditions
conditions.description: All items are combined with AND. Each element: comparison | aggregation | composite. max_loss_pct is often <=0 when equity is below day start; e.g. 5% down from start: operator <=, value -5.

match_streak.description: Lifted from stored evaluation; null when not stored on the row.

metrics.title: Metrics
metrics.description: Metric snapshot at evaluation time: [{name: value}, ...] sorted by name.

rule_snapshot.description: Conditions/watermarks as evaluated; may be absent on older persisted rows.

payload.title: Payload
payload.description: Evaluator details only; match_streak, metrics, and rule_snapshot are not duplicated here.

RuleEvaluationHistoryItem.title: RuleEvaluationHistoryItem
RuleEvaluationHistoryItem.description: One persisted rule evaluation as returned in batch history APIs.

assigned_at.title: Assigned At
assigned_at.description: Membership assigned_at at fire time (UTC), if any.

frozen_at_assignment.title: Frozen At Assignment
frozen_at_assignment.description: True when the membership used an evaluation_snapshot at fire time.

RuleEvaluationSnapshotPayload.title: RuleEvaluationSnapshotPayload
RuleEvaluationSnapshotPayload.description: Rule binding as evaluated when this history row was written (audit trail).

RuleMembershipSettingsPatch.title: RuleMembershipSettingsPatch
RuleMembershipSettingsPatch.description: Partial update for rule_phases flags (omit = leave unchanged).

notify_on_match.title: Notify On Match
notify_on_match.description: Always true: notifications are mandatory when the threshold is met.

RuleMembershipSettingsResponse.title: RuleMembershipSettingsResponse
RuleMembershipSettingsResponse.description: Per-account automation when a rule fires (after match + notify threshold).

phase_ids.title: Phase Ids
phase_ids.description: Replace phase assignments only when sending a JSON array. Omit key or send JSON null to keep existing memberships; empty array = library rule (unassign every phase).

cron_expression.title: Cron Expression
cron_expression.description: Null = full evaluation on ingress events only. Five-field UTC cron: ingress checks conditions silently; matched side effects emit on each UTC cron tick (`execute_scheduled`, built-in loop or `POST /internal/jobs/cron-rules-tick`).

violation_interval.title: Violation Interval
violation_interval.description: Incident deduplication window in milliseconds; null disables.

conditions.title: Conditions
conditions.description: Replace full list; all items AND. Same shape as RuleCreate.conditions.
